fixesApplied.description: Added group-hover:text-charcoal! to btn-tertiary span and group-hover classes to tag pills for proper inversion on hover
changes: Line 17: Added 'group-hover:bg-white/80 group-hover:border-charcoal/20 transition-colors' to tag pills so they remain visible on accent hover background
Line 29: Added 'group-hover:text-charcoal!' to btn-tertiary span so the CTA text changes color when the card is hovered

fixesApplied.description: Added group-hover classes to tag pills and confirmed btn-tertiary already has correct hover styling
changes: Lines 20, 27: Added 'group-hover:bg-white/80 group-hover:border-charcoal/20 transition-colors' to both audience and resource_type tag pills
Line 46: Confirmed btn-tertiary already has 'group-hover:text-charcoal!' from previous implementation

fixesApplied.description: Added simultaneous image zoom and Learn More accent color on parent group hover
changes: Line 26: Added 'group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300' to post thumbnail image
Line 49: Added 'group-hover:text-[var(--accent-color)]! transition-colors' to the card-post-cta span so both effects trigger on parent link hover

fixesApplied.description: Updated blog card CTA hover rule to use group hover and added policy btn-tertiary fix
changes: Lines 111-114: Changed from '.card-post-cta:hover' to '.group:hover .card-post-cta' and '.group:focus-within .card-post-cta' so hovering anywhere on the card link triggers the accent color
Lines 135-138: Added CSS rule for policy card btn-tertiary to force charcoal color on hover (specificity override for btn-tertiary component)

fixesApplied.description: Added accessibility improvements: aria-live region enhancements, focus management attributes, disabled state support, and landmark roles
changes: Line 192: Changed form role from 'form' to 'search' when search is enabled (dynamic role based on $show_search)
Line 259: Added aria-label='Clear all filters' to in-form Clear All button
Line 267: Added aria-label='Items per page' to per-page selector
Line 281: Added aria-label='Clear all filters' to active-filters Clear All button
Line 304: Added role='status' and aria-label='Loading results' to loading spinner
Line 309: Added role='region', aria-label='Archive results', and tabindex='-1' to results container for focus management and landmark navigation

fixesApplied.description: Added aria-busy toggling during AJAX loads, focus management after content updates, and disabled state management for Load More button
changes: Line 54: Set aria-busy='true' on results container when AJAX starts (non-append mode)
Line 112: Move focus to results container after non-append AJAX load for screen reader awareness
Line 117: Set aria-busy='false' on results container when AJAX completes
Lines 218-223: Added aria-disabled='true', aria-busy='true', and originalText preservation to Load More button when clicked
Lines 91-100: Updated Load More button restoration logic to clear aria-disabled and aria-busy attributes
Lines 152-158: Added handleFilterPillKeyboard function for Enter/Space key support on filter pills
Line 177: Added keyboard event handler to active filters container
Lines 195-200: Added keyboard event handler to form-level Clear All button

fixesApplied.description: Rebuilt the test page with DemoContainer wrappers and all 11 variations including missing ones
changes: Added DemoContainer wrapper around each Archive block variation with demoTitle and demoDescription
Added missing variations: Blog Archive - Long Content (Edge Case), Archive - Empty Optional Fields, Resources Archive - With Eyebrow, Blog Archive - Single Column
Total variations: 11 (up from 7)
Verified block count via taktician_wp_count_blocks: 11 takt/archive blocks confirmed

warnings: Webpack performance warnings (asset size limits) - these are informational only and do not affect functionality

syncStatus.notes: PHP files updated for card templates. Archive.php and Archive.js updated for accessibility. No TSX changes needed for this fix.

notes: All hover effects now trigger on parent group hover/focus-within for better accessibility and consistent UX
Tag pills on policy and resource cards use group-hover:bg-white/80 group-hover:border-charcoal/20 to remain visible on accent background hover
Blog card image zoom (scale-105) and Learn More accent color now animate simultaneously when hovering the parent link
Accessibility improvements follow WAI-ARIA best practices: aria-busy for dynamic content, focus management after AJAX, keyboard support for interactive elements
Test page now has all 11 variations wrapped in DemoContainer blocks with descriptive titles and descriptions
No design decisions were made - all changes follow the exact specifications from the planning agent
